description: Northwind Traders needs to reconcile its Cash on Hand account and set up a new current account. Create a new bank account named 'Business Checking Account'. Record a journal entry for $35.00 in unrecorded bank service charges by debiting 'Bank Charges' and crediting 'Cash on Hand' with the narration 'Bank service charges — monthly'. Record a transfer of $5,000.00 from Cash on Hand to the Business Checking Account by creating a journal entry debiting 'Business Checking Account' and crediting 'Cash on Hand' with the narration 'Inter-account transfer to business checking'. Verify that both accounts appear in the bank accounts list. Login: administrator (no password) at http://localhost:8080
